title: On Kaworus ancestry as well
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 06, 2008 9:38 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Seeing as we don't know who Kaworu's DNA/body is from, we don't know that.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Mon Jan 07, 2008 12:23 am I said not entirely Japanese. They're both partially Japanese, but I can't exactly say they are 100% Japanese. At least in Kaworu's case. I'm skeptical about how 'homo sapien' Rei is.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 07, 2008 1:48 am Lilith is a homo sapiens so Rei is 100% any way you slice it.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Jan 07, 2008 5:03 am Anta baka? Lilith may be human, but she's not homo sapiens!!!

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Mon Jan 07, 2008 6:18 am Homo sapien sapien? Kaworu may be Japanese blood, but he might just have a Japanese name because he was concieved in Japan, and the people associated with his 'creation' decided to use a Japanese name.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Jan 07, 2008 8:21 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Lilith is a homo sapiens so Rei is 100% any way you slice it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 07, 2008 10:32 am The Imperialist wrote: Kaworu may be Japanese blood, but he might just have a Japanese name because he was concieved in Japan, and the people associated with his 'creation' decided to use a Japanese name.

[]:             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Mon Jan 07, 2008 10:45 am Reichu wrote: he was raised in Germany under Seele's fine care.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 07, 2008 11:45 am UrsusArctos wrote: Lilith may be human, but she's not homo sapiens!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Tue Jan 08, 2008 10:30 am Anti-Goth wrote: Reichu wrote: he was raised in Germany under Seele's fine care.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Jan 08, 2008 1:57 pm Fine, for the benefit of the Japanese staff when he was coming from Germany? Or is the Japanese name there to make it easier to hide his background? For one, from which person did the body come from for Kaworu?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 08, 2008 4:54 pm They really should have called him Adam and been done with it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Jan 08, 2008 4:57 pm Wouldn't it be too obvious?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 08, 2008 5:02 pm Sometimes the best place to hide something is in plain sight because no one would think you'd be dumb enough to do it so they don't look there. Honestly, why not? SEELE spilled it to us in the NPC and Gendo seemed to pick up on it rather quickly due to the similrities with Rei. What difference would it have really made?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Jan 08, 2008 5:04 pm To make sure Shinji and the rest would fight properly?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 08, 2008 5:09 pm Would Shinji make the connection? Everyone else picked up on his weirdness except Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Jan 08, 2008 5:45 pm Good point actually. If Kaworu was called ‘Adam’ I think it is pretty obvious, but considering Shinji… which reminds me, this isn’t about Asuka at all!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 08, 2008 8:28 pm Reichu wrote: Japanese ancestry provides a fairly straightforward explanation as to why Kaworu would be in possession of a Japanese name (in addition to the Angel one).

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Wed Jan 09, 2008 3:26 am Hmm, another mystery that needs solving. Hoping all of it would be answered in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jan 09, 2008 5:19 am Don't hope too much. Rebuild is a different continuity altogether. As for Shinji not picking up on Kaworu's wierdness- nothing exceptional about that since nobody did, not even Fuyutsuki, who was there during the synch tests and who knew perfectly well what Rei was. *coughplotholecough*
summary:
[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 06, 2008 9:38 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Seeing as we don't know who Kaworu's DNA/body is from, we don't know that.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Mon Jan 07, 2008 12:23 am I said not entirely Japanese. They're both partially Japanese, but I can't exactly say they are 100% Japanese. At least in Kaworu&
